overall.description: A first-person walk along a sunny beach in a video game environment (resembling GTA V), starting from the water's edge and progressing past stilted beach houses toward a wooden pier. The clip features clear skies, bright sunlight, and transitions from wet shoreline sand to dry beach with scattered pedestrians and surfboards.

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet shoreline where gentle waves meet the sand, approaching beach houses in the distance

entered.detail: calm blue ocean with small waves lapping at the shore
dark wet sand where waves have recently receded
light tan dry sand stretching up the beach
red, yellow, and blue beach umbrella near the houses
modern beach houses raised on wooden stilts and pilings
green hills and mountains rising behind the beach houses

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the water's edge on a sunny beach, with gentle ocean waves washing over wet sand. The camera walks forward along the shoreline toward a cluster of stilted beach houses, passing a colorful beach umbrella on the left with mountains visible in the distant background.

events.description: passing the colorful beach umbrella and entering the area directly alongside the raised beach houses

agents.ego_description: walking closely alongside the stilted beach houses, passing wooden stairs and rocky foundations

entered.detail: large boulders and rocks at the base of the beach houses
wooden staircases leading up from the beach to the house entrances
two white surfboards leaning against a house on the right

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside the stilted beach houses, the camera passes wooden stairs and rocky foundations. The colorful umbrella is left behind as the houses loom closer on the left, and white surfboards appear leaning against one of the structures.

events.description: wooden pier and lifeguard building come into view in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach past surfboards, approaching the wooden pier structure extending into the ocean

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending far out into the ocean with a building at the end
white lifeguard station with a red roof near the pier entrance
grassy sand dunes rising up to the right of the beach path

segments.scene_description: The camera continues past the surfboards and beach houses, with the wooden pier and lifeguard station gradually coming into view ahead. The beach opens up as the houses recede, revealing the long pier structure extending into the calm ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier approach and open ocean vista

events.description: camera turns to face the ocean, revealing the sun and creating lens flare over the water
camera turns back toward the beach, showing people walking with surfboards near the pier

agents.ego_description: reaching the pier area, turning to admire the ocean view and sun, then continuing along the beach past other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two people walking along the water's edge near the pier

entered.detail: bright sun visible in the sky creating lens flare over the ocean
small white sailboat visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Approaching the pier, the camera turns to face the open ocean, capturing the bright sun and a distant sailboat. The view then shifts back to the beach where pedestrians walk along the shore near the pier entrance, with the lifeguard building visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the rhythmic edge of the ocean toward a cluster of rustic beach dwellings. It begins at the shoreline where gentle waves wash over wet sand, moving past a colorful beach umbrella with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the camera progresses, the terrain shifts from the open waterfront to the immediate vicinity of stilted beach houses. The scene then closes in on the architectural details of the homes, passing wooden stairs and rocky foundations before gliding past white surfboards leaning against the structures.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a residential stretch of the shoreline toward the expansive open vista of a wooden pier. It begins by gliding past surfboards and stilted beach houses, which gradually recede as the beach opens up to reveal a long pier and a lifeguard station ahead. As the camera approaches the pier entrance, the view shifts toward the horizon to capture the bright sun and a distant sailboat drifting on the calm ocean. The scene then turns back toward the shore, passing pedestrians walking along the sand with the lifeguard building remaining visible to the left.
